hero.title: Getting Started with CareNet
hero.description: Your complete guide to using CareNet Bangladesh. Find answers to common questions and learn how to make the most of our platform.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started in 4 Easy Steps
gettingStarted.description: Follow these simple steps to start using CareNet

step1.title: Choose Your Role
step1.description: Select your role when registering—Guardian, Caregiver, Agency, Patient, or Shop Owner.
step1.detail1: Each role has a tailored experience for your specific needs

step2.title: Create Your Account
step2.description: Provide your basic information and secure your account.

step3.title: Complete Your Profile
step3.description: Add role-specific details to personalize your experience.
step3.detail1: Guardians: Add patients and set preferences
step3.detail3: Agencies: Add licenses, services, team members
step3.detail4: Patients: Add health info, emergency contacts, preferences
step3.detail5: Shop Owners: Set up shop, add products, configure shipping

step4.title: Start Using CareNet
step4.description: Explore features and connect with the CareNet community.

roleGuides.title: Guides by Role
roleGuides.description: Step-by-step guides tailored to your role
roleGuides.followSteps: Follow these steps to get the most out of CareNet as a {{role}}

step2.title: Review Agency Bids
step2.b1: Compliance score (how well they match your requirements)
step2.b5: Any messages or clarifications from the agency

step3.title: Accept a Bid and Confirm Placement
step3.b1: Choose the bid that best fits your needs
step3.b2: Accepting locks the contract and initiates the placement process

step4.title: Monitor Care in Real-Time
step4.b2: View care logs and vital recordings
step4.b4: Communicate with caregivers and the agency

step5.title: Provide Feedback
step5.b1: Rate your caregiver and the agency after shifts are completed
step5.b2: Your feedback helps improve the platform and helps other families make informed decisions

step2.title: Apply for Jobs
step2.b1: Submit applications for jobs that match your skills and preferences
step2.b2: Include a brief message explaining why you are a good fit

step3.title: Complete Your Verification
step3.b1: If you have not already, complete the 6-step verification process
step3.b2: Verified caregivers receive priority in job matching

step4.title: Log Care During Shifts
step4.b1: Check in through the app (GPS and photo verification)
step4.b2: Log care activities, medications, and vitals throughout the shift
step4.b3: Add notes about the patient vegetation
step4.b4: Check out at the end of your shift

step5.title: Track Your Earnings
step5.b1: View your earnings in real-time from the Earnings dashboard
step5.b2: Monitor daily income, weekly summaries, and payment dates

step1.title: Respond to Care Requirements
step1.b1: Review incoming care requirements from guardians in your Requirements Inbox
step1.b2: Submit bids with staffing proposals, rates and terms, and care plans tailored to the patient's needs

step3.title: Monitor Active Placements
step3.b1: Track all active client placements from the Placements dashboard
step3.b2: See shift schedules and caregiver assignments

step4.title: Process Payroll
step4.b1: Use the automated payroll system to calculate caregiver earnings based on completed shifts
step4.b2: Process payouts via bKash or bank transfer with full audit trails

offlineMode.title: Offline Mode
offlineMode.subtitle: How it works
offlineMode.f1: Log care activities even without connection
offlineMode.f4: Prevent data loss with offline buffer
offlineMode.bp3: Follow system prompts for unsynced records

communication.title: Communication Features
communication.subtitle: In-App Messaging and Notifications
communication.m1: Chat with caregivers, agencies, and guardians
communication.n1: Get push alerts for critical updates
communication.n2: Receive shift reminders and schedule changes
communication.n3: See new bid and application updates

q1.question: Is CareNet free to use?
q1.answer: Creating an account is free. We charge service fees on transactions and offer premium subscription plans for advanced features.

q2.question: How long does verification take?
q2.answer: The 6-step verification process typically takes 3-7 business days, depending on how quickly you provide the required documents.

q3.question: Can I change my role after registering?
q3.answer: You can add additional roles to your account. Contact support if you need to change your primary role.

q4.question: What if I have technical issues?
q4.answer: Our support team is available 24/7 to help with technical issues. Submit a ticket or call our hotline for immediate assistance.

support.title: Support Resources
support.description: Get help when you need it
support.helpCenterDesc: Access our comprehensive Help Center with articles, guides, and video tutorials on every aspect of using CareNet.
support.ticketNote: If you have a specific issue or request, submit a support ticket through the app. Our team typically responds within 24 hours.
